description: Shared IBM Cognos Analytics REST API connection. Session-based auth via /api/v1/session with a security namespace (LDAP / CognosEx / etc.). Pairs with cognos_report_run_job / cognos_report_status_sensor / cognos_report_data_ingestion / cognos_workspace.

base_url_env_var.label: Base URL Env Var
base_url_env_var.description: Env var with Cognos Analytics base URL (no /api path).

namespace_env_var.label: Namespace Env Var
namespace_env_var.description: Env var with the Cognos security namespace (e.g. LDAP, CognosEx).
